kbd._comment: Copy this file to kbd-agent-notify.config.json, then set enabled:true. WINDOWS/Dell: calibrate the flash first (see README) and use taskName/requestPath; Windows ignores the mac* wave keys and treats count/onMs/offMs as a square blink. macOS: no calibration; build macos/kbdflash and use the mac* keys below. On macOS the flash is a smooth 'ocean swell' (macShape:wave): onMs = swell width, offMs = gap between swells, macSlowdown = how much longer each successive swell is (lower frequency).
